title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Brahmaputra Board Act, 1980. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1 31st December, 1981, vide notification No. G.S.R. 677(E), dated 28th December, 1981, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
